'''zashozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaccinomics|vaccinomics]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaccinomics|vaccinomics]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zashozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæshezeth|zæshezeth]] || [[word:zæshezej|zæshezej]] || [[word:zæshezesh|zæshezesh]] || [[word:zæsheze|zæsheze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zashoshozoth|zashoshozoth]] || [[word:zashoshozoj|zashoshozoj]] || [[word:zashoshozosh|zashoshozosh]] || [[word:zashoshozo|zashoshozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zashozoth|zashozoth]] || [[word:zashozoj|zashozoj]] || [[word:zashozosh|zashozosh]] || [[word:zashozo|zashozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zashofzoth|zashofzoth]] || [[word:zashofzoj|zashofzoj]] || [[word:zashofzosh|zashofzosh]] || [[word:zashofzof|zashofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zashozotho|zashozotho]] || [[word:zashozojo|zashozojo]] || [[word:zashozosho|zashozosho]] || [[word:zashozoko|zashozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zashozoth|zashozoth]] || [[word:zashozoj|zashozoj]] || [[word:zashozosh|zashozosh]] || [[word:zashozo|zashozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zashozothol|zashozothol]] || [[word:zashozojol|zashozojol]] || [[word:zashozoshol|zashozoshol]] || [[word:zashozokol|zashozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zashozothotho|zashozothotho]] || [[word:zashozojojo|zashozojojo]] || [[word:zashozoshosho|zashozoshosho]] || [[word:zashozoko|zashozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zashozothon|zashozothon]] || [[word:zashozojon|zashozojon]] || [[word:zashozoshon|zashozoshon]] || [[word:zashozokon|zashozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zashozothoro|zashozothoro]] || [[word:zashozojoro|zashozojoro]] || [[word:zashozoshoro|zashozoshoro]] || [[word:zashozokoro|zashozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
